products.name: Iced Out Audemars Piguet Royal Oak
products.description:
Luxury iced out timepiece featuring premium lab-grown diamonds. Features include:

  • 41mm case diameter
  • Full diamond bezel and dial
  • Swiss automatic movement
  • Sapphire crystal glass
  • Water resistant to 50m
  • Comes with luxury presentation box

products.name: Iced Out Rolex Submariner
products.description:
Stunning iced out Rolex Submariner with full diamond coverage. Features include:

  • 40mm case diameter
  • Full diamond bezel and bracelet
  • Swiss automatic movement
  • Ceramic bezel insert
  • Water resistant to 300m
  • Comes with luxury presentation box

products.name: Iced Out Patek Philippe Nautilus
products.description:
Elite iced out Patek Philippe Nautilus with premium diamond setting. Features include:

  • 40mm case diameter
  • Full diamond dial and bezel
  • Swiss automatic movement
  • Sapphire case back
  • Water resistant to 120m
  • Comes with luxury presentation box

products.name: Iced Out Cartier Santos
products.description:
Sophisticated iced out Cartier Santos with elegant diamond setting. Features include:

  • 39mm case diameter
  • Diamond bezel and dial
  • Swiss quartz movement
  • Sapphire crystal glass
  • Water resistant to 100m
  • Comes with luxury presentation box

products.name: Iced Out Richard Mille RM 011
products.description:
Ultimate luxury iced out Richard Mille with exceptional diamond coverage. Features include:

  • 44mm case diameter
  • Full diamond case and bezel
  • Swiss automatic movement
  • Skeleton dial
  • Water resistant to 50m
  • Comes with luxury presentation box
